schema_note: seed_base + seed_offset = fal.ai seed for that character. Keep seeds stable across a campaign for visual consistency.

characters.description: Woman, 40-45, suburban, real proportions, naturally tired but warm expression, no gym aesthetic, dressed in everyday clothes
characters.avoid: athletic build, visible abs, gym wear, posed smiling

characters.description: Man, 38-48, suburban, slightly out of shape, genuine face, dressed casually — office-casual or weekend clothes
characters.avoid: muscular, tank top, fitness model look, exaggerated expressions

characters.description: Coach, 35-50, approachable, not physically intimidating, dressed simply — not in branded polo unless natural, warm eye contact
characters.avoid: overly athletic, posed, staged coaching scene, pointing at camera

characters.description: Woman or man, 35-50, real gym member, candid expression of quiet accomplishment — not pride, just ease
characters.avoid: before/after framing, dramatic transformation look, trophy expression
